title: begonia × dinglensis
intro: Begonia × hybrida, also known as Begonia × hybrida 'Dinglensis', is a hybrid plant species derived from the Begonia genus, which includes over 1,800 species of flowering plants. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Begonia × hybrida 'Dinglensis' include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
